name: k8s-on-premise
description: Multi-node Kubernetes cluster from scratch with kubeadm. 1 master + 2 workers on Vagrant/VirtualBox. Calico CNI, NGINX Ingress, Helm add-ons and ArgoCD GitOps demo.
descriptionES: Clúster Kubernetes multi-nodo desde cero con kubeadm. 1 master + 2 workers en Vagrant/VirtualBox. Calico CNI, NGINX Ingress, add-ons Helm y demo GitOps con ArgoCD.
features: Full kubeadm bootstrap — not k3s or minikube
ArgoCD GitOps — self-heal: true, prune: true
featuresES: Bootstrap kubeadm completo — no k3s ni minikube
Calico CNI con políticas de red
ArgoCD GitOps — self-heal: true, prune: true
